result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text - text
LINE 16:     EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate)) AS handle...
                                            ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH case_with_assign_ct AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    c.ownerid AS final_ownerid,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_assignments
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN casehistory__c ch
    ON ch.caseid__c = c.id
  GROUP BY c.id, c.ownerid, c.createddate, c.closeddate
),
eligible_cases AS (
  SELECT
    final_ownerid AS agent_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM case_with_assign_ct
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND createddate >= TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02'
    AND owner_assignments <= 1
),
agent_avgs AS (
  SELECT
    agent_id,
    AVG(handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds,
    COUNT(*) AS case_count
  FROM eligible_cases
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM agent_avgs
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH case_with_assign_ct AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    c.ownerid AS final_ownerid,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_assignments
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN casehistory__c ch
    ON ch.caseid__c = c.id
  GROUP BY c.id, c.ownerid, c.createddate, c.closeddate
),
eligible_cases AS (
  SELECT
    final_ownerid AS agent_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM case_with_assign_ct
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND createddate >= TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02'
    AND owner_assignments <= 1
),
agent_avgs AS (
  SELECT
    agent_id,
    AVG(handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds,
    COUNT(*) AS case_count
  FROM eligible_cases
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM agent_avgs
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH case_with_assign_ct AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    c.ownerid AS final_ownerid,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_assignments
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN casehistory__c ch
    ON ch.caseid__c = c.id
  GROUP BY c.id, c.ownerid, c.createddate, c.closeddate
),
eligible_cases AS (
  SELECT
    final_ownerid AS agent_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM case_with_assign_ct
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND createddate >= TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02'
    AND owner_assignments <= 1
),
agent_avgs AS (
  SELECT
    agent_id,
    AVG(handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds,
    COUNT(*) AS case_count
  FROM eligible_cases
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM agent_avgs
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH case_with_assign_ct AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    c.ownerid AS final_ownerid,
    c.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
    c.closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_assignments
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN casehistory__c ch
    ON ch.caseid__c = c.id
  GROUP BY c.id, c.ownerid, c.createddate, c.closeddate
),
eligible_cases AS (
  SELECT
    final_ownerid AS agent_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_ts - created_ts)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM case_with_assign_ct
  WHERE closed_ts IS NOT NULL
    AND created_ts >= TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02'
    AND owner_assignments <= 1
),
agent_avgs AS (
  SELECT
    agent_id,
    AVG(handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds,
    COUNT(*) AS case_count
  FROM eligible_cases
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM agent_avgs
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH case_with_assign_ct AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    c.ownerid AS final_ownerid,
    c.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
    c.closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_assignments
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN casehistory__c ch
    ON ch.caseid__c = c.id
  GROUP BY c.id, c.ownerid, c.createddate, c.closeddate
),
eligible_cases AS (
  SELECT
    final_ownerid AS agent_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_ts - created_ts)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM case_with_assign_ct
  WHERE closed_ts IS NOT NULL
    AND created_ts >= TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02'
    AND owner_assignments <= 1
),
agent_avgs AS (
  SELECT
    agent_id,
    AVG(handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds,
    COUNT(*) AS case_count
  FROM eligible_cases
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM agent_avgs
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;
